metadata.title: AI to reshape job market: What skills set you apart in an AI world?
metadata.description: Artificial intelligence (AI) is expected to reshape the labor market, replacing some human workers and augmenting others. LinkedIn newsletter writer Andrew McCaskill joins Asking for a Trend to discuss how to leverage the skills AI can't replicate to secure your role. Earlier this week, Upwork (UPWK) CEO Hayden Brown explained how the contingent and freelance labor markets have been flourishing amid the rise in AI adoption. Also, catch Wall Street Journal's Greg Ip explain to Yahoo Finance why people are still uncomfortable with AI. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Asking for a Trend.
metadata.keywords: labor market, Artificial intelligence, LinkedIn, Hayden Brown, human workers
